description: An OSINT analyst must fuse social media posts, news reports, and satellite imagery to assess battle damage after a strike.

nodes.task_description: Analyze post-strike satellite imagery to identify visible damage to the target.

expected_outcome.value: Analyst correctly identifies the physical damage from the imagery.

nodes.task_description: Scour social media and local news for posts, photos, or videos from the target area.

expected_outcome.value: Analyst finds multiple social media posts confirming the destruction of the target.

nodes.task_description: Fuse the imagery and OSINT to create a comprehensive Battle Damage Assessment (BDA) report.

expected_outcome.value: Analyst produces a report confirming mission success with evidence from multiple sources.
